findings.title: Missing role definition boundary
findings.description: The system prompt does not clearly define role boundaries.
evidence: No explicit role boundary instructions found

findings.title: Broad tool permissions
findings.description: Tools have overly broad permissions without sufficient constraints.
findings.recommendation: Restrict tool permissions to minimum necessary.

findings.title: No untrusted data boundary markers
findings.description: System prompt lacks markers to separate trusted and untrusted data.
evidence: No delimiters or boundary markers found
findings.recommendation: Add clear boundary markers for untrusted data.

findings.title: Missing human-in-the-loop for sensitive actions
findings.description: No escalation path defined for sensitive operations.
evidence: No escalation rules found in policies
findings.recommendation: Define escalation rules for sensitive actions.

attack_paths.name: Prompt Injection via User Input
attack_paths.description: Attacker can inject instructions through user input to override system prompt.
steps: Craft malicious user input with instruction override

recommended_fixes.title: Add role boundary instructions
recommended_fixes.description: Include explicit instructions defining what the agent should and should not do.

recommended_fixes.title: Restrict tool permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Add parameter validation and scope limits to tool definitions.
